title: Cate Blanchett is taking on AI
abstract: Cate Blanchett is taking on AI may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms. HN discuss...
abstract_zh: 凯特· Blanchett 搞定了 AI？别看她穿高跟鞋打字慢，这工具却快得让你怀疑人生。专治各种 AI 顽疾，精准到没朋友！HN 讨论时记得带上这条，保证你笑掉大牙。
